package rulefixtures

import (
	bcrypt "golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
)

// scenario for bcrypt_cost_too_low: `bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword(pw, cost)` where `cost` is literally `< 10` or `bcrypt.MinCost`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario697Negative(password []byte) ([]byte, error) {
	return bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword(password, bcrypt.DefaultCost)
}
